message:
docs: Complete branding update to 'Get Image [from] Internet Link'

Updates remaining branding references from "Get iCloud Image Link" to
"Get Image [from] Internet Link" to reflect multi-platform support:
- README.md header and description
- giil script header comment
- install.sh description

This completes the rebranding started in 5562f5b.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,10 +6,10 @@

giil

-

Get iCloud Image Link

+

Get Image [from] Internet Link

- A zero-setup CLI that downloads full-resolution images from iCloud photo shares + A zero-setup CLI that downloads full-resolution images from cloud photo shares

@@ -1613,7 +1613,7 @@ giil integrates with [gum](https://github.com/charmbracelet/gum) for beautiful t │ │ │ ╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ │ │ ║ giil ║ │ -│ ║ Get iCloud Image Link v3.0.0 ║ │ +│ ║ Get Image [from] Internet Link v3.0.0 ║ │ │ ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ │ │ │ │ ◐ Launching browser... │

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 #
-# giil - Get iCloud Image Link (Hybrid Edition v3.0)
-# Downloads images from iCloud photo shares with maximum reliability
+# giil - Get Image [from] Internet Link (v3.0)
+# Downloads images from cloud sharing services (iCloud, Dropbox, Google Photos, Google Drive)
 #
 # FEATURES:
 #   - Primary: Click Download button (direct file acquisition)

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 #
 # giil installer
-# Downloads and installs giil (Get iCloud Image Link) to your system
+# Downloads and installs giil (Get Image [from] Internet Link) to your system
 #
 # Usage:
 #   curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/giil/main/install.sh | bash
